usage: selectBusGuide [-help] [-all] [-area {x1 y1 x2 y2}] [-direction {H V}] [-layer {id | id1:id2}] [-netGroup {netGroup | {list_of_net_groups}}]

options.name: -all
options.description: Specifies whether to select all the bus guide segment

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates of the area

options.name: -direction
options.description: Specifies the direction of bus guide segments
